cause_analysis.narrative: Elevate Beauty Lounge churned on 2026-02-13 after 232 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-08 via app_chat — 36 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 36 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via phone_call, client wrote: "This call will be recorded for quality purposes. Thank you for calling Elevate Beauty Lounge, how can I help you? Hi, th…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via phone_call, client wrote: "This call will be recorded for quality purposes. Thank you for calling Elevate Beauty Lounge. We're sorry we couldn't pi…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
